scorecard.notes: Large orphan doc cluster; lab docs not linked from any index
CLAUDE.md is a symlink; README/AGENTS duplicate content; competing task-board formats
11 confirmed broken relative links across 2 files
Env-var sets differ; stale revision in SCHEMA.md; path formats inconsistent
.env.example wrong location, stale alembic head, ANALYTICS.md ref missing
Render/Railway ambiguity in ARCHITECTURE.md + devSteps.md; mixed current/target
Core rules well-stated in AGENTS.md; trial-mode and consent phrasing needs tightening
Multiple tasks lack done criteria, verifiable steps, or working-directory specs
Few docs have dates or owners; cannot tell what is current vs aspirational
ROUTING_CLEANUP.md bypasses workboard; migration docs folder misnamed

findings.issue: CLAUDE.md is a symlink to AGENTS.md; no standalone content; ambiguous canonical entry point.
findings.impact: Unclear which doc is authoritative for human vs agent readers; edits auto-propagate.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace symlink with standalone CLAUDE.md that references AGENTS.md.

findings.issue: Tech stack table and core architectural rules duplicated nearly verbatim across README.md and AGENTS.md.
findings.impact: Changes must be made in two places; risk of silent drift.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep full rules in AGENTS.md; reduce README.md to brief summary with link.

findings.issue: Docs section headings and canonical reference lists differ between AGENTS.md and README.md.
findings.impact: Users cannot determine which is the current canonical doc index.
findings.recommended_fix: AGENTS.md should be the sole canonical index; README should reference it.

findings.issue: ARCHITECTURE.md mixes current Render deployment details with target Railway post-cutover topology.
findings.impact: Readers cannot tell which state the system is actually in.
findings.recommended_fix: Add 'Current State' vs 'Target State' separation or move Render details to legacy appendix.

findings.issue: Root docs reference docs/API.md but file only exists at docs/labs/weather-wellness/API.md.
findings.impact: Readers searching for docs/API.md will not find it.
findings.recommended_fix: Create platform-level docs/API.md stub or update all references to use full lab path.

findings.issue: ARCHITECTURE.md references docs/ANALYTICS.md but file only exists at docs/labs/weather-wellness/ANALYTICS.md.
findings.impact: Readers following canonical references will not find the file.
findings.recommended_fix: Create platform-level stub or update references to use full lab path.

findings.issue: Canonical docs reference docs/WEATHER_INGESTION.md but file only exists at docs/labs/weather-wellness/WEATHER_INGESTION.md.
findings.impact: Readers cannot locate the weather ingestion spec using the stated path.
findings.recommended_fix: Create docs/WEATHER_INGESTION.md stub or update all canonical references.

findings.issue: DECISIONS.md RESOLVED-18 references docs/MISOKINESIA.md but file exists only at docs/labs/weather-wellness/tasks/MISOKINESIA.md.
findings.impact: Readers following the decision record cannot locate the misokinesia architecture doc.
findings.recommended_fix: Create stub or update DECISIONS.md to use the full path.

findings.issue: ARCHITECTURE.md and docs/migrations/working-railway-supabase-canada-migration.md both describe the same Railway cutover plan.
findings.impact: Two documents describe the same target state; changes must be coordinated in both.
findings.recommended_fix: Retire migration doc as archive; reference ARCHITECTURE.md as canonical.

findings.issue: ROUTING_CLEANUP.md is a standalone implementation playbook outside the canonical workboard.json task queue.
findings.impact: Operators must check two task-board formats; unclear whether tasks are active or historical.
findings.recommended_fix: Migrate tasks into workboard.json; mark ROUTING_CLEANUP.md as historical.

findings.issue: ARCHITECTURE.md post-impl checklist directs updating ROUTING_CLEANUP.md, bypassing workboard.json.
findings.impact: Operators directed to update ROUTING_CLEANUP.md are working outside the canonical queue.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace ROUTING_CLEANUP.md references in ARCHITECTURE.md checklist with workboard.json directions.

findings.issue: UI_REDESIGN_2026.md is not referenced in AGENTS.md, README.md, or any canonical docs index.
findings.impact: New contributors won't discover the 2026 redesign direction; design guidance is split.
findings.recommended_fix: Add reference from AGENTS.md or consolidate into styleguide.md.

findings.issue: PRD.md references target deployment without clarifying which items are shipped vs. planned.
findings.impact: New team members cannot determine if PRD describes current requirements or future direction.
findings.recommended_fix: Add Status section at the top clarifying shipped/in-progress/planned items.

findings.issue: devSteps.md marks Render section as historical then continues documenting Render as current deployment.
findings.impact: Developers cannot tell whether to set up Render (legacy) or Railway (target).
findings.recommended_fix: Clearly separate Current Setup and Target Setup sections, or remove Render documentation.

findings.issue: New_Schema.md and MULTI_LAB.md both cover the same multi-lab schema design with overlapping content.
findings.impact: Unclear which is current design vs aspirational; changes must be coordinated in both.
findings.recommended_fix: Use MULTI_LAB.md as authoritative; archive New_Schema.md.

findings.issue: docs/migrations/ folder contains strategic planning docs, not migration runbooks as the name implies.
findings.impact: Readers may waste time looking for schema migration scripts here instead of in backend/alembic/.
findings.recommended_fix: Rename to docs/planning/ or add README.md explaining folder purpose.

findings.issue: PROGRESS_LOG.md header states archive-only but does not direct readers to docs/workboard.json.
findings.impact: Developers may append to PROGRESS_LOG.md despite the warning.
findings.recommended_fix: Add second line directing readers to docs/workboard.json for the active task queue.

findings.issue: No documented template or structure requirement for lab-specific README files.
findings.impact: New labs may produce inconsistently structured documentation.
findings.recommended_fix: Create docs/labs/README.md template/checklist for lab onboarding.

findings.issue: Not referenced in any root or canonical doc; unclear if current, historical, or superseded.
findings.impact: Operators needing historical weather backfill guidance may not find this doc.
findings.recommended_fix: Add reference from WEATHER_INGESTION.md if still current, or move to archive.

findings.issue: working- prefix suggests draft but DECISIONS.md RESOLVED-18 suggests misokinesia is complete; no status marker.
findings.impact: Ambiguous whether this is a completed planning doc or active work.
findings.recommended_fix: Integrate into MISOKINESIA.md and archive, or rename with clear status marker.

findings.issue: Canonical path references use inconsistent formats (relative vs repo-root, with/without leading slash).
findings.impact: No consistent format makes cross-referencing harder and confuses agents.
findings.recommended_fix: Establish canonical path style in AGENTS.md: always use repo-root-relative paths.

findings.issue: Three entry-point docs at repo root with unclear hierarchy.
findings.impact: New contributors/operators may not know which doc to read first.
findings.recommended_fix: Establish clear hierarchy: README for discovery, AGENTS.md for all operational detail.

findings.issue: Link [docs/styleguide.md](styleguide.md) uses incorrect relative path; file is two directories up.
findings.impact: Reader cannot navigate to styleguide.md by clicking the link.
findings.recommended_fix: Change target to ../../styleguide.md.

findings.issue: Link [docs/animejs.md](animejs.md) uses incorrect relative path; file is two directories up.
findings.impact: Reader cannot navigate to animejs.md by clicking the link.
findings.recommended_fix: Change target to ../../animejs.md.

findings.issue: Link to MISOKINESIA.md uses wrong path; file is in tasks/ subdirectory.
findings.impact: Reader cannot navigate to Misokinesia task spec from design spec.
findings.recommended_fix: Change target to tasks/MISOKINESIA.md.

findings.issue: Link to DIGITSPAN.md uses wrong path; file is in tasks/ subdirectory.
findings.impact: Reader cannot navigate to Digit Span task spec from design spec.
findings.recommended_fix: Change target to tasks/DIGITSPAN.md.

findings.issue: Four broken links: ULS8.md, CESD10.md, GAD7.md, COGFUNC8A.md — all missing surveys/ prefix.
findings.impact: Reader cannot navigate to survey specifications from design spec.
findings.recommended_fix: Change all four targets to include surveys/ prefix.

findings.issue: Five broken links: DIGITSPAN.md missing tasks/ prefix; ULS8.md, CESD10.md, GAD7.md, COGFUNC8A.md missing surveys/ prefix.
findings.impact: Reader cannot navigate to detailed scoring specifications.
findings.recommended_fix: Update to tasks/DIGITSPAN.md, surveys/ULS8.md, surveys/CESD10.md, surveys/GAD7.md, surveys/COGFUNC8A.md.

findings.issue: devSteps.md not linked with a markdown link from any navigation doc; only mentioned in free text.
findings.impact: New developers may not discover this setup checklist through navigation.
findings.recommended_fix: Add markdown link from README.md or AGENTS.md.

findings.issue: Analytics architecture specification not linked from any parent or navigation doc.
findings.impact: Analytics contributors cannot discover this specification through navigation.
findings.recommended_fix: Add markdown link from labs/weather-wellness/README.md or ARCHITECTURE.md.

findings.issue: Canonical FastAPI endpoint reference not linked from any parent or navigation doc.
findings.impact: API consumers cannot discover endpoint contracts through navigation.
findings.recommended_fix: Add markdown link from labs/weather-wellness/README.md and/or AGENTS.md.

findings.issue: Operational procedure not linked from any doc. See also DOC-AUDIT-019.
findings.impact: Operators running weather backfill must know to search for this doc.
findings.recommended_fix: Add link from WEATHER_INGESTION.md and/or devSteps.md.

findings.issue: Lab README not linked from any parent documentation.
findings.impact: Readers cannot navigate back to lab overview from lab-specific docs.
findings.recommended_fix: Add markdown link from root README.md and/or AGENTS.md.

findings.issue: Canonical scoring reference not linked from any parent doc; DESIGN_SPEC.md links are broken (DOC-055).
findings.impact: Scorers and validators cannot discover this spec through navigation.
findings.recommended_fix: Fix broken links in DESIGN_SPEC.md; add direct link from labs/weather-wellness/README.md.

findings.issue: Feature specification not linked from any parent doc.
findings.impact: Weather ingestion implementers cannot discover spec through navigation.
findings.recommended_fix: Add link from labs/weather-wellness/README.md and ARCHITECTURE.md.

findings.issue: AGENTS.md instructs Copy .env.example -> .env but file is at backend/.env.example, not repo root.
findings.impact: Developers following the quickstart will not find the file; initial setup fails.
findings.recommended_fix: Update to Copy backend/.env.example -> backend/.env.

findings.issue: SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET listed as unconditional in AGENTS.md but conditional in CONVENTIONS.md/ARCHITECTURE.md; SUPABASE_ANON_KEY missing from ARCHITECTURE.md and devSteps.md.
findings.impact: Operators may not know which env vars are truly required; incomplete configuration.
findings.recommended_fix: Consolidate env var documentation into a single source table in CONVENTIONS.md or docs/ENV_VARS.md.

findings.issue: SCHEMA.md verification checklist states alembic head Rev: 20260313_000001 but Migration History shows current head is 20260407_000001.
findings.impact: Developers using the checklist will see a mismatch and may incorrectly assume their setup is wrong.
findings.recommended_fix: Update line 19 to Rev: 20260407_000001 and add note to keep in sync after each migration.

findings.issue: Multiple workboard analytics tasks reference docs/labs/weather-wellness/ANALYTICS.md in their docs field, but this file needs verification that it exists and matches the referenced content.
findings.impact: Task automation tools cannot locate the referenced doc.
findings.recommended_fix: Verify ANALYTICS.md exists and contains expected content; correct workboard refs if needed.

findings.issue: CONVENTIONS.md JWT description is vague; no mention of JWKS primary / HS256 fallback modes documented in ARCHITECTURE.md.
findings.impact: Developers reading CONVENTIONS.md alone may not understand the dual JWT verification mode.
findings.recommended_fix: Update to reference JWKS primary / HS256 fallback and point to ARCHITECTURE.md.

findings.issue: devSteps.md verification checklist states stale alembic head revision; PYTHONPATH=. prefix requirement inconsistently documented across devSteps.md and TESTING.md.
findings.impact: Developers may add unnecessary prefix to alembic or omit from pytest.
findings.recommended_fix: Clarify PYTHONPATH=. is only needed for pytest; update stale revision in devSteps.md.

findings.issue: .codex/skills/ exists but contains only symlinks to ../../.agents/skills/, not actual skill implementations.
findings.impact: Developers searching .codex/skills/ for skill implementation find only symlinks; technically inaccurate docs.
findings.recommended_fix: Update AGENTS.md line 40 to note that skills are symlinked from .agents/skills/.

findings.issue: SCHEMA.md references timezone correction migration 20260228_000008 (T47a) but this migration is absent from the Migration History table.
findings.impact: Operators tracing timezone history may miss the migration context.
findings.recommended_fix: Add migration 20260228_000008 (T47a) to Migration History table with explicit date and details.

findings.issue: T143 task lacks working-directory specification for commands.
findings.impact: Agent may run pytest or alembic from wrong directory.
findings.recommended_fix: Add explicit cd backend prefix to all commands in T143 commands array.

findings.issue: When task commands are missing or incomplete, choose validation from this repo's actual setup gives no decision rule.
findings.impact: Agents may over-test or under-test depending on interpretation.
findings.recommended_fix: Add explicit decision tree for adding test/build coverage based on missing commands and changed code type.

findings.issue: Frontend auth guard two-layers section lists gates but provides no verification command or test.
findings.impact: Agents may implement route changes that bypass one gate.
findings.recommended_fix: Point to route-topology test file that verifies both gate layers.

findings.issue: T115 acceptance criteria require exact seed counts but do not state whether seed is idempotent.
findings.impact: Agents may be unsure if running the seed script twice is safe.
findings.recommended_fix: Clarify whether seed is idempotent (upsert) or one-shot; add reset guidance.

findings.issue: T142 says output is ready for manual inspection but does not specify what agent should do after creating mocks.
findings.impact: Agent cannot determine whether to mark task done or wait for approval.
findings.recommended_fix: Add explicit done criteria: Storybook builds without errors; all variant states render; agent commits and awaits manual review gate.

findings.issue: AGENTS.md line 28 could be misread as consent is optional rather than consent is gated client-side.
findings.impact: Agent reading AGENTS.md:28 in isolation might think consent can be skipped programmatically.
findings.recommended_fix: Clarify: consent screen gates participant flow UI before navigation to first survey but does not write a DB row.

findings.issue: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -m pytest assumes execution from repo root; fails in non-standard CWDs.
findings.impact: Agents in worktrees or CI with different CWDs may encounter confusing PYTHONPATH errors.
findings.recommended_fix: Document in AGENTS.md: all backend commands must be run from repo root using cd backend && PYTHONPATH=. prefix.

findings.issue: Treat parity test failures as blocking but no guidance on how to resolve a parity failure.
findings.impact: Agents may skip parity tests or attempt changes that break parity without understanding the root cause.
findings.recommended_fix: Add resolution guidance: parity failures indicate Python drift from R script; verify logic against reference/Weather_MLM.R.

findings.issue: T132 dry-run acceptance criterion does not specify output format; agent cannot verify success without sample output.
findings.impact: Agent may implement wrong output format for the dry-run command.
findings.recommended_fix: Specify required output format (plaintext table/JSON/CSV) and include sample output snippet in notes.

findings.issue: T143 listed as implemented in API.md but /misokinesia/trial-manifest absent from ARCHITECTURE.md routing inventory.
findings.impact: Agents may add the endpoint again or assume it is not canonical.
findings.recommended_fix: Update ARCHITECTURE.md routing inventory to include /misokinesia/trial-manifest after T143 completion.

findings.issue: Demographic field canonicalization notes mention variant mappings without comprehensive list or reference to import service code.
findings.impact: Agents re-implementing import logic may miss edge cases.
findings.recommended_fix: Add reference to backend/app/services/import_service.py:_normalize_demographics() for complete rules.

findings.issue: Trial mode should use clearly fake frontend-only ids but does not specify format; agents may use real UUIDs.
findings.impact: Fake ids may collide with real data or be inconsistent across WW and Misokinesia flows.
findings.recommended_fix: Specify: fake trial ids use trial- prefix + local sequence number; never use UUID v4 in trial mode; store in session/local storage only.

findings.issue: Copy .env.example -> .env gives no guidance for fresh clone where .env.example is absent; corroborates DOC-AUDIT-100.
findings.impact: Agents in fresh clones fail immediately at dev workflow entry without clear recovery path.
findings.recommended_fix: Add prerequisite: ensure backend/.env.example exists; if missing derive variables from ARCHITECTURE.md Railway Setup section.

findings.issue: Acceptance criterion references RA route-topology coverage but does not link to the test file or show an example.
findings.impact: Agents may skip route-topology coverage or add incomplete coverage.
findings.recommended_fix: Add to notes: add assertion to frontend/src/app/api/ra/route-topology.test.ts; see existing assertions for pattern.

findings.issue: Acceptance criterion POST /misokinesia/start returns manifest URLs that load with no 403 has no verification procedure for a non-browser agent.
findings.impact: Agents may skip this verification or perform it inconsistently.
findings.recommended_fix: Add to commands: verify by fetching a manifest URL in Python with requests and asserting status 200.

findings.issue: CONVENTIONS.md says trial-run watermark should not appear on Misokinesia participant page; API.md TRIAL_RUN_MODE section does not mention watermark visibility at all.
findings.impact: Agents may add watermark to Misokinesia pages, violating the CONVENTIONS constraint.
findings.recommended_fix: Clarify in both docs: trial run watermark visible on WW participant pages only; explicitly omit from /misokinesia/[id].

findings.issue: Acceptance criterion for null threshold edge cases does not specify test fixtures.
findings.impact: Agents may skip or under-test the null threshold edge case.
findings.recommended_fix: Add fixture guidance: fixture with 1 unique study day; fixture with zero temperature variance; verify both return null thresholds.

findings.issue: Place schemas in backend/app/schemas/ one file per domain does not specify naming convention or when to split vs consolidate.
findings.impact: Agents may create inconsistently named or fragmented schema files.
findings.recommended_fix: Add: name files after the domain; group all *Create, *Response, *Update schemas for that domain in the same file.

findings.issue: AGENTS.md mentions workflow skills but gives no decision tree for when to use start-task vs query-workboard vs ralphloop.
findings.impact: Agents may invoke the wrong skill or run skills in the wrong order.
findings.recommended_fix: Add decision tree: query-workboard to list tasks; start-task for single task; ralphloop for autonomous multi-task loops only.

findings.issue: The full backend analytics regression suite passes is vague; agent could run only one file and claim done.
findings.impact: Incomplete test coverage; analytics regressions go undetected.
findings.recommended_fix: Specify the full test file list in commands: all 9 test_analytics_*.py and related router test files.

findings.issue: Trial-mode helper list includes getTrialRunWatermarkLabel but no guidance on whether watermark logic belongs in trial-mode.ts vs a component file.
findings.impact: Agents may place trial-mode logic in the wrong module.
findings.recommended_fix: Clarify: trial mode plumbing in src/lib/trial-mode.ts (pure functions); UI rendering in separate component; neither should have side effects.

conflicts.conflict: Tech stack and arch rules duplicated; divergence risk (DOC-002, DOC-003)
SUPABASE_ANON_KEY missing from ARCHITECTURE.md env var table (DOC-101)
Both describe Render as current/legacy without clear status (DOC-004, DOC-014)
Same Railway cutover plan in two places (DOC-009)
Post-impl checklist directs updating ROUTING_CLEANUP.md, bypassing workboard.json (DOC-011)
Stale alembic head revision in both (DOC-102, DOC-105)
Trial-run watermark visibility rule present in CONVENTIONS.md, absent in API.md (DOC-165)

gaps.impact: Canonical references broken for docs not in labs/weather-wellness tree
gaps.action: Create stub or update all references

gaps.impact: New labs produce inconsistently structured docs

gaps.gap: No docs/ENV_VARS.md single-source env var table
gaps.impact: Drift between AGENTS.md, CONVENTIONS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, devSteps.md
Agents fail on first run without clear recovery path
Inconsistent id schemes across WW and Misokinesia flows

gaps.gap: Import normalization rules only in code
gaps.impact: Agents re-implementing import logic miss edge cases
gaps.action: Extract to IMPORT_NORMALIZATION_RULES.md or link from SCHEMA.md

gaps.gap: Analytics full regression suite not enumerated
gaps.impact: Tasks can be marked done with partial test coverage

remediation_plan.action: Replace CLAUDE.md symlink with standalone doc; establish README -> AGENTS.md entry point hierarchy
Fix all 11 broken relative links in DESIGN_SPEC.md and SCORING.md
remediation_plan.value: Restores all in-doc navigation for the most-used lab docs

remediation_plan.action: Fix .env.example path in AGENTS.md Dev Workflow; add recovery guidance for missing file
remediation_plan.value: Eliminates S0 setup blocker on fresh clone

remediation_plan.action: Create platform-level stub docs or update all canonical references to use full lab paths
remediation_plan.value: Fixes 4 navigation dead-ends in canonical docs

remediation_plan.action: Consolidate env var documentation into a single source table in CONVENTIONS.md
Add decision trees for: (a) when to add test coverage; (b) which workflow skill to use
Specify trial-mode fake-id format in CONVENTIONS.md; align trial-watermark visibility in API.md
Update stale alembic head revision in SCHEMA.md and devSteps.md
remediation_plan.value: Eliminates developer confusion on clean-slate setup

remediation_plan.action: Tighten done criteria for T142 (Storybook mocks), T115 (manifest URLs), T134 (analytics regression suite)
remediation_plan.value: Prevents tasks being marked done prematurely

remediation_plan.action: Separate current vs target state in ARCHITECTURE.md and devSteps.md
remediation_plan.value: Eliminates Render/Railway ambiguity for new operators
